stemHtml: A bundle of electrical cables within the avionics bay, and in close proximity to one another, have been poorly insulated during installation. What is the most significant risk?

options.a: Increased power consumption of the components’, as poorly insulated cables have an increased internal resistance.
options.b: Frequent and/or incoherent tripping of circuit breakers (CBs).
options.d: Fire as a result of electrical arcing.
